conflict: A communal feast becomes the site where private theft is recognized in public and answered by the people harmed.
consequence: Silas is exposed as the source of the stolen names, injured, and effectively cast out of Sump Ward.
must_land_beats: Stage the feast as genuinely warm and funny before accusation turns it.
Let the matching of ward phrases to cheap labels feel inevitable and devastating.
Give Inez the moment of recognition without reducing her to pure vengeance.
Use the trough incident to hold comedy and harm in the same image.
End with exile, not instant reconciliation or melodramatic violence.
pressure_source: A communal feast becomes the site where private theft is recognized in public and answered by the people harmed.
state_shift: Silas is exposed as the source of the stolen names, injured, and effectively cast out of Sump Ward.
